mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card display and behavior on Print and Payment History page when a subscription plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages tracking, tooltips, and page usage information display across different printing scenarios.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment with a specific plan tier. While printers_page.py contains an 'enroll_in_instant_ink' button (data-testid='enroll-II-pp'), this is for initiating enrollment, not for the enrollment state verification or setup. The test case requires the printer to already be enrolled with a 50+ pages plan before the test begins. No API helpers, enrollment verification methods, or plan setup utilities were found in this batch. Enrollment setup methods likely exist in other batches containing API helpers or backend utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires verifying subscription state (no free months). No subscription verification methods, API helpers, or subscription state checkers were found in this batch. This batch contains only UI page objects for printer setup/management. Subscription verification methods likely exist in other batches containing API helpers or subscription management utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires verifying subscription status is 'subscribed'. No subscription status verification methods, API helpers, or status checkers were found in this batch. This batch contains only UI page objects for printer setup/management. Subscription status verification methods likely exist in other batches containing API helpers or subscription management utilities.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires clicking a Pause Plan button or Pause Instant Ink link. No CIT modal page object, pause plan buttons, or pause instant ink links were found in this batch. The printers_page.py contains Instant Ink enrollment button but not pause functionality. Pause plan UI elements likely exist in other batches containing Instant Ink dashboard or subscription management page objects.

test_case_mappings.no_match_reason: Test case C44873414 is about the Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink, specifically testing the Billing Cycle Period card display, complimentary pages progress bar, additional pages progress bar, tooltips, and page usage tracking when a subscription plan is paused. This batch contains 5 page objects related to printer setup, selection, updates, management, and privacy banner handling. None of these files contain components for the Print and Payment History page or billing cycle functionality. Specifically: (1) printer_replacement_page.py - Contains locators for printer replacement setup UI (setup buttons, printer cards) but no billing or payment history elements. (2) printer_selection_page.py - Contains locators for printer selection carousel, printer cards, add printer functionality, but no billing or payment history elements. (3) printer_updates_page.py - Contains locators for accepting automatic printer updates but no billing or payment history elements. (4) printers_page.py - Contains locators for printer management including online status, options menu, remove printer, and Instant Ink enrollment button. While this page has an 'enroll_in_instant_ink' button, the test case is about the billing/payment history page AFTER enrollment, not the enrollment process itself. No billing cycle card, progress bars, or payment history elements found. (5) privacy_banner_page.py - Contains locators for OneTrust privacy banner acceptance but no billing or payment history elements. The test case requires: PrintAndPaymentHistoryPage (not in this batch), billing_cycle_period_card (not in this batch), complimentary_pages_progress_bar (not in this batch), additional_pages_progress_bar (not in this batch), plan_pause_information_text (not in this batch), tooltip elements (not in this batch), page usage tracking elements (not in this batch), time manipulation APIs (not in this batch), print simulation APIs (not in this batch). All required components for this test case likely exist in other batches containing Instant Ink dashboard, payment history, or billing-related page objects and API helpers.
